title: Licences, Permits, Registrations and Authorization Certificates - Canada.ca
content:
## Licences, Permits, Registrations and Authorization Certificates

## Class A Precursor Licence
Please use the PDF versions to fill the forms out and save them to your computer. The HTML format should only be used for viewing the forms. The filled PDF forms must be printed and signed to be considered complete.
The Additional Alternative Responsible Person in Charge application form must be filled if the applicant intends on designating more than two Alternative Responsible Persons in Charge. This form must be submitted as part of the complete Class A precursor licence application package.
- Application for a Class A Precursor Licence
- Application for a Class A Precursor Licence – Additional Alternative Responsible Person in Charge
All licensed dealers must complete and submit the Annual Report template no later than March 31 of each calendar year. Section 87 of the Precursor Control Regulations (PCR) requires that a licensed dealer shall make a report to the Minister, within three months after the end of each calendar year, which summarises all authorised activities pertaining to Class A precursors at the licensed site. The data is also used to provide reports on precursors substances to the International Narcotics Control Board (INCB) and is required to fulfil Canada's obligations under the United Nations Convention against Illicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances of 1988.
If you would like to obtain a copy of the Class A precursor annual report template, send an email to: hc.ocs.monitoring-surveillance.bsc.sc@canada.ca

### Guidance Documents and Templates
- Class A Precursors – Monthly Ephedrine Report Template

## Class B Precursor Registration
Please use the PDF versions to fill the forms out and save them to your computer. The HTML format should only be used for viewing the forms. The filled PDF forms must be printed and signed to be considered complete.
- Application For a Class B Precursor Registration

## Import, Export and Transit/Transhipment Permits
If you would like to request any application forms for Import, Export and Transit / Transhipment of Precursor Chemicals, send an email to hc.permitspermis.sc@canada.ca
- Application for Export Permit for Controlled Substance or Precursors
- Application for Import Permit for Controlled Substance or Class A Precursor
- Supplementary Table of Countries Requiring Pre-Export Notification With Regard to Class B Precursors

## Precursor Chemical Authorization Certificate
Class A or Class B precursor preparations and mixtures may be exempted from the application of the Precursor Control Regulations, if they meet the specified conditions. An authorization certificate will be issued once the Minister determines that the preparation or mixture poses little risk of diversion to illegal markets or uses, and that the precursor cannot be easily extracted from the preparation or mixture.
Please use the PDF version to fill the form out and save it to your computer. The HTML format should only be used for viewing the form. The filled PDF form must be printed and signed to be considered complete.
- Application for an Authorization Certificate for Preparations and Mixtures of Class A or Class B Precursors
